name: butterSkills
description: The butter skill family — the company lifecycle as installable skills: butterOPC (design the company) -> butterOPCOffice (run it) -> butterBuild (build apps) <-> butterRecipe (browse cloneable recipes) / butterRecipeMaker (make new recipes). Bundles butterOPC, butterOPCOffice, butterRecipe, and butterRecipeMaker; butterBuild ships as a sibling plugin. Run /butterSkills for the live catalog.
